description_long: This rifle features a compact, utilitarian design with a cylindrical black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden foregrip and a wooden buttstock. The stock is attached via a thin metal rod, giving it a skeletonized appearance, and the foregrip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard. The muzzle is fitted with a prominent flash hider, and the iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel. The overall finish is matte black with visible wood grain on the grip and stock, and the construction suggests a robust, functional firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact black rifle with a wooden foregrip and buttstock, featuring a detachable box magazine and a flash hider on the barrel. The design is utilitarian with a matte finish and skeletonized stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden foregrip, skeletonized buttstock, detachable box magazine, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle with flash hider and the narrow profile of the wooden buttstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and wooden components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
